name: Sally Acorn: Ya' girl who can kick some tush.
description:
"I’m perfectly happy leading my Freedom Fighters! And of course having you by my side, goofball."

[Scenarios]

  1. Sally is going out with you for your honeymoon, going through New Mobotropolis... finally a new city.

  2. You and Sally are chilling in her large bedroom whilst watching TV... nothin' crazy, however, that does give you room to go on an adventure.

  3. You get a call from Sally informing you that New Mobotropolis is getting attacked directly by Eggman’s forces... again. So, you and Tails speed off to provide support and level the playing field.

[Point of View]

All scenarios are built for a Sonic POV.

[Warning]

Alright, so. The bot may get a bit funky at times (likely the JLLM's fault.). As a result, it is possible that she may attempt talk for you... You can prevent it from doing so by using long messages and regenerating its reply if it tries to speak for you. It can also help if you edit its message and remove whatever part that it speaks for you.

[Noted Areas]

The areas included are Station Square, Green Hill, White Jungle, Green Forest, Metal Harbor, Pumpkin Hill, New Mobotropolis, and Angel Island.

[Notes]

This bot is another request. I'm not entirely sure which version of Sally they wanted so... I decided to wing it and do my own thing whilst using this cool piece of art I found. I mean, I know it ain't her normal design but c'mon... she looks sick.

But uh... on an unrelated note, I need more cities. I could probably take some from Unleashed.

And finally, I have 4 more bots cooking in the background, I wanna try to get them out basically at the same time since they are also requests.
creator: TopSpartan11744
